content.problemStatement:
You are given a tree with NNN vertices numbered 1 through NNN as a sequence of N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 edges ‚ÄĒ pairs (a1,b1),(a2,b2),‚Ä¶,(aN‚ąí1,bN‚ąí1)(a_1, b_1), (a_2, b_2), \ldots, (a_{N-1}, b_{N-1})(a1‚Äč,b1‚Äč),(a2‚Äč,b2‚Äč),‚Ä¶,(aN‚ąí1‚Äč,bN‚ąí1‚Äč). Let's define the value of a sequence AAA with length N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 as
F(A)=‚ąĎi=1N‚ąí1Ai‚čÖWi‚ÄČ,F(A)=\sum_{i=1}^{N-1} A_i \cdot W_i \,,F(A)=‚ąĎi=1N‚ąí1‚ÄčAi‚Äč‚čÖWi‚Äč,
where W1,W2,‚Ä¶,WN‚ąí1W_1, W_2, \ldots, W_{N-1}W1‚Äč,W2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,WN‚ąí1‚Äč are given weights.

You may change the order of the pairs and the order of elements within any pairs. Formally, consider a reordering (P,R)(P, R)(P,R) ‚ÄĒ any permutation P=(P1,P2,‚Ä¶,PN‚ąí1)P = (P_1, P_2, \ldots, P_{N-1})P=(P1‚Äč,P2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,PN‚ąí1‚Äč) of the integers 111 through N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 and any subset RRR of these integers (possibly containing all of them). Let's define two sequences C=(cP1,cP2,‚Ä¶,cPN‚ąí1)C = (c_{P_1}, c_{P_2}, \ldots, c_{P_{N-1}})C=(cP1‚Äč‚Äč,cP2‚Äč‚Äč,‚Ä¶,cPN‚ąí1‚Äč‚Äč) and D=(dP1,dP2,‚Ä¶,dPN‚ąí1)D = (d_{P_1}, d_{P_2}, \ldots, d_{P_{N-1}})D=(dP1‚Äč‚Äč,dP2‚Äč‚Äč,‚Ä¶,dPN‚ąí1‚Äč‚Äč), where for each valid iii, ci=aic_i = a_ici‚Äč=ai‚Äč and di=bid_i = b_idi‚Äč=bi‚Äč if i‚ąąŐłRi \not\in RiÓÄ†‚ąąR, or ci=bic_i = b_ici‚Äč=bi‚Äč and di=aid_i = a_idi‚Äč=ai‚Äč if i‚ąąRi \in Ri‚ąąR. If DDD is **strictly** increasing, the reordering is valid and its value is F(C)F(C)F(C).

Find the maximum value of a valid reordering, i.e. the maximum F(C)F(C)F(C), and the number of valid reorderings that have this maximum value.
constraints: 1‚Č§ai,bi‚Č§N1 \le a_i, b_i \le N1‚Č§ai‚Äč,bi‚Äč‚Č§N for each valid iii
pairs (ai,bi)(a_i, b_i)(ai‚Äč,bi‚Äč) are edges of a tree
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10610^6106
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 5,0005,0005,000
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 space-separated integers W1,W2,‚Ä¶,WN‚ąí1W_1, W_2, \ldots, W_{N-1}W1‚Äč,W2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,WN‚ąí1‚Äč.
N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 lines follow. For each iii (1‚Č§i‚Č§N‚ąí11 \le i \le N-11‚Č§i‚Č§N‚ąí1), the iii-th of these lines contains two space-separated integers aia_iai‚Äč and bib_ibi‚Äč.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing two space-separated integers ‚ÄĒ the maximum value of a reordering and the number of reorderings with the maximum value.
